name: A664SetStringSignal
title: A664SetStringSignal
syntax: long A664SetStringSignal (dbSignal aSignal, char val[], a664Message aMessage) (2)
description: This function can be used to set a string-signal within a specific a664Message (form 2) or to set the Tx-signal of the CANoe-subsystem (form 1).
For AFDX the usual string format contains the string length information at the first 2 bytes of the signal position, so the usual string operations won’t work correct on string signal.

parameters.name: aMessage
parameters.description: The message object where the signal value should be set for variant 2.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
